vulnerability.hypothesis: The array variant of IsObjectEscaped in ScalarReplacement.cpp (around line 1249) has the same PostWriteBarrier bug as the object variant. When an array is scalar-replaced but used as the value operand of PostWriteBarrier (stored into another object), escape analysis misses the escape. The array allocation is removed but a reference persists in the other object, causing type confusion or UAF when the reference is read.
